top_signals.title: SoftBank Group adds over $61 billion in market cap in two days on AI led optimism
top_signals.summary: Shares of SoftBank Group extended gains for a second straight session Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The US Navy is full speed ahead on building a laser fleet
top_signals.summary: Operation Epic Fury may have strengthened the case for laser weapons, but the U.S. Navy’s dream of putting one on every ship may take longer than expected.

top_signals.title: CoStar Data Shows Office Yield Gap Narrowing Between London and the Big Six
top_signals.summary: Improving investor sentiment narrows the office yield gap between London and major regional markets, according to data from CoStar, a global leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260522576099/en/ Based on a three-quarter trailing average, London’s transaction-based office [...]

top_signals.title: Shell Returns to Dutch Supreme Court in Landmark Climate Case
top_signals.summary: Supermajor Shell is facing the Netherlands’ Supreme Court in an emissions lawsuit that a few years ago led to a ruling forcing the company to slash emissions from operations by 45% by 2030, which was later overturned at a higher court. Back in 2021, the District Court in The Hague ordered Shell to reduce its carbon dioxide emissions by 45% by 2030 in a landmark ruling on a suit brought in front of the court by environmentalist group Milieudefensie, other NGOs, and a group of private individuals. At the time, commentators said that the ruling…
